findings: Fall protection 100% compliant on all elevated work including pylon and marine barge operations. Dive operations pre-dive checklist current. One worker without high-vis vest in ground-level staging area. Housekeeping excellent throughout. Fire suppression on marine barge verified.
corrective_actions: Issued replacement vest on site. No other items outstanding.

findings: Marine crane barge annual load test certification current. Crawler crane boom inspection complete – no deficiencies. Two rigging slings found with damaged eyes in rigging locker – removed from service. Compressor relief valves tested and functional.
corrective_actions: Removed damaged slings and updated rigging inventory. Replacement slings ordered. Tags placed on removed items.

findings: All dive equipment inspected and calibrated. Emergency O2 kit on barge fully stocked. Dive supervisor certification current. Vessel navigation lights operational. USCG float plan filed for week. Life rings and throw bags in place.

Ballard Bridge site – fall protection compliant. Vehicle backing spotter requirement not consistently followed at concrete pump area – three occurrences observed. Spotter vest colors do not match company standard. Temporary lighting at Pier 6 work area below required foot-candles.
corrective_actions: Retrained all drivers and spotters on backing procedures. Issued standardized orange vests. Added two light towers at Pier 6.
